description_long: This is a monumental stone and metal sculpture set on a square base with a rough, rocky perimeter. The central pedestal is adorned with ornate reliefs and decorative motifs, including garlands and shields. Four large, dark patinated animal figures, possibly lions or griffins, are positioned at the corners of the pedestal, each facing outward. Above the pedestal rises a tall, tapering column with additional sculptural details and a prominent figure or group at the summit. The base is surrounded by scattered stones, suggesting a historic or commemorative theme. The overall appearance is grand and imposing, suitable for a public square or park.
description: A grand stone and metal monument with animal figures at the corners and a tall, ornate column topped by a sculpted figure. The base is surrounded by rough stones, giving it a historic and commemorative feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main face of the pedestal with a large arched relief, two animal figures flanking the sides, and the central column rising above.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the side panel of the pedestal, two animal figures, and the rocky base extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the pedestal, all four animal figures visible, and the column's decorative details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side panel of the pedestal, two animal figures, and the rocky base.
attribute_subject_matter: historic monument with animal figures and a commemorative column
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is set on a stone base surrounded by rough ground, suggesting an outdoor public space such as a plaza or park.
